title: Kraven the Hunter
content:
{{Otheruses|Kraven the Hunter}} {{Stub}} {{Characters |image = Kraven the Hunter Infobox.jpg |name = Kraven the Hunter |real_name = Sergei Kravinoff |alias = {{Alias |codenames = The Hunter
Kraven the Hunter |nicknames = Kraven |undercover = [[Prisoner 0864]]}} |species = [[Humans|Human]] |gender = Male |citizenship = {{Citizenship|RUS}}
{{Citizenship|ENG}} |status = Alive |movie = ''[[Morbius (film)|Morbius]]'' (mentioned in newspaper)[https://propstoreauction.com/lot-details/index/catalog/359/lot/120064 Lot #1429: ''MORBIUS'' (2022) - Three Newspaper Pages]
''[[Kraven the Hunter (film)|Kraven the Hunter]]'' |portrayed_by = [[Aaron Taylor-Johnson]]
[[Levi Miller]] (young)}} {{Quote|I stared [[Death]] in the face, and for the first time... I saw my true self.|Sergei Kravinoff|Kraven the Hunter (film)}} '''Sergei Kravinoff''' (Russian: '''Сергей Кравинов''') is a [[Russia]]n immigrant, an international people hunter, the son of gangster [[Nikolai Kravinoff]] and his [[Anna Kravinoff|late wife]], and the half-brother of [[Chameleon|Dimitri Smerdyakov]]. Since their childhood, Sergei and Dimitri were trained by Nikolai to be hunters and strong men, however, Sergei was attacked by a [[Lions|lion]] that would cause his death, but he was saved by [[Calypso]]'s potion and gained powers in relation to animals and the land. After arguing with his father over killing the same lion, Sergei fled his home and hid in Russia, where he developed his powers and became a violent vigilante around the [[Earth|world]], becoming known worldwide as '''Kraven the Hunter'''. Returning to [[London]] for Dimitri's birthday, Kraven met his savior, Calypso, and they formed a mutual partnership for him to complete his list of evil people to kill. Following Dimitri's kidnapping, Kraven set out to rescue him, without his father's intervention, and received the support of Calypso in attempting to track down his captors, which involved him in a conflict with the power-hungry criminal known as [[Rhino]], who was previously rejected by Nikolai for an alliance, although Kraven, aided by Calypso, confronted Rhino and his criminal empire, defeating the altered human. Discovering Nikolai's conspiracy and responsible for Kraven's revelation, he confronted his father and had him killed by a [[Bears|bear]], causing Dimitri to take his father's position, while Kraven received a lion skin jacket left by Dimitri to continue his missions. ==Biography == ===Early Life=== ====Raised by Nikolai==== Sergei Nikolaevich Kravinoff was born in [[Volgograd]], [[Russia]], to Russian gangster [[Nikolai Kravinoff]] and his wife [[Anna Kravinoff]]. He later gained a half-brother named Dimitri from his father's mistress Sonya Smerdyakova and the boys became inseparably closed. During his childhood, Sergei and Dimitri were trained by their father to become strong and fearsome men through abuse, but they love to spend their summer with their mother in a hidden animal sanctuary that his maternal relatives owned in Russia.{{Ref|KtH}} ====Mother's Death==== ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ====Hunting the Tsar Lion==== ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ====Saved by Calypso==== Sergei Kravinoff|Kraven the Hunter (film)}} ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ====[[Infiltration into Ozdemir Monastery]]==== ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ====Taking refuge with Calypso==== ''To be Kravinoff|Killing his Father]]==== ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ===New Adventures=== ====Confronting Dimitri==== ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ====Accepting his Role==== ''To be added''{{Ref|KtH}} ====Publicly Known==== Sergei Kravinoff became a nemesis to the superhero [[Spider-Man]], developing a "vendetta" against the masked vigilante.[https://youtu.be/rze8QYwWGMs ''Kraven the Hunter'' official synopsis][https://image-engine.com/portfolio/kraven-the-hunter/ ''Kraven the Hunter'' - Image Engine] Kraven the Hunter's name eventually became well-known enough to the [[United States of America|Americans]] to be used by ''[[The Daily Bugle]]'' as a word for their newspapers' crosswords.[https://propstoreauction.com/lot-details/index/catalog/359/lot/120064 Lot #1429: ''MORBIUS'' (2022) - Three Newspaper Pages]''[[Morbius (film)|Morbius]]'' ==Personality== {{Quote|You're a goddamn lunatic."
"Oh, you just figured that out now?|[[Calypso]] and Sergei Kravinoff|Kraven the Hunter (film)}} ''To be added'' ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Tell me about this Hunter."
"They say he uses a connection with animals to track his prey, and once you're on his list, there's only one way off.|[[Aleksei Sytsevich]] and [[Foreigner]]|Kraven the Hunter (film)}} *'''Animal Physiology''': The special potion given to him by Calypso bequeathed Kravinoff an innate faculty to emulate and proportionally implement the unique skills and abilities of many animals in the wild. The strength of lions, speed of gazelles, agility of simians, etc. All of which sit at the fingertips of the superhuman Kraven. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Kraven's strength, derived from a potion, surpasses normal human limits, rivaling that of animals like lions and buffaloes. He has demonstrated this enhanced strength by easily overpowering two men restraining him, throwing another man across a room, and significantly impacting a moving vehicle during a chase. He even managed to dent bulletproof glass with a punch and briefly ground a helicopter by grabbing its ladder. While he possesses the strength to send someone like the Rhino flying with a kick, a feat made more impressive by the fact they were on a moving truck, making the Rhino less stable, but Rhino's dense hide prevents Kraven from inflicting serious injury. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Kraven's durability is remarkably heightened against conventional means, as he landed after a fall without crippling his legs, was pierced through a bulletproof window with no marks on his hands, and even survived being dropped with a scaffolding on to him. Although he is not bulletproof at all, as weaponry like knives and bullets are capable of cutting into his flesh, he can endure attacks from other individuals with superhuman powers like the Rhino. **'''Superhuman Speed''': Kravinoff's speed comes from feats similar to that of a tiger or cheetah, as he could run into the forest to catch a deer during his youth and take on two armed hunters. He could throw a knife at one of them while jumping in rapid succession before both could react. During his prison escape, he escaped the gunfire by running miles through a storm in time to reach his plane. The full manifestation of this trait was when he chased down four kidnappers who had kidnapped his brother, running through buildings and platforms to chase them before the helicopter could take off. **'''Superhuman Senses''': In addition to the serum enhancing Kraven's physical abilities, he possesses heightened senses of sound, smell, and vision, as his hearing can pick up conversations, smelling can detect perfumes that came from subjects that imprinted onto others, and his vision is equal to that of a hawk to see at greater distances. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Kraven possesses quicker reaction to dodge, anticipate, and reflect the movements of incoming threats. It was demonstrated by the rocket launcher firing a shot at him from his headquarters through the forest and falling before it could hit him. **'''Superhuman Dexterity''': Kraven's body coordination has improved, giving him incredible agility and maneuverability. He has been able to climb and switch positions in the prison, even jumping onto the roof and landing directly on his feet with ease. This trait is primate like as he moves between walls like a spider monkey, usually agile enough to even climb ledges without losing control. **'''Animal Companionship''': Kraven has an affinity for any and all beings of the animal kingdom, forming an empathic rapport with most any faunal critter he comes in contact with. Enabling him to rally and command voluminous numbers of many beasts of burden to act on his behalf or fight beside him in battle. **'''Taming''': Kraven's newfound powers enable the titular hunter enables him to bond with and subjugate most forms of animal life he makes contact with. These powers prove useful for effective misdirection and information gathering. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|Why do you hunt?"
"My [[Nikolai Kravinoff|father]] puts evil into the world, I take it out.|[[Calypso]] and Sergei Kravinoff|Kraven the Hunter (film)}} *'''Expert Hunter/Tracker''': As a young man, Sergei went hunting with his father, but after being attacked by a lion, Calypso forced him to swallow her own potion to save his life. After awakening to his newfound powers, he decided to live in solitude to learn the ways of the beasts and protect the lands from poachers. Over the years, Karvinoff earned a reputation for hunting and killing those in his father's organization who were difficult to reach but had no equal in his skills. *'''Expert Marksman''': ''To be added'' *'''Expert Combatant''': ''To be added'' {{Quote|Охотник - это миф.Translates from Russian to: "''The Hunter is a myth.''""
"В каждом мифе есть доля правды.Translates from Russian to: "''There's an ounce of truth in every myth.''"|[[Semyon Chorney]] and Sergei Kravinoff|Kraven the Hunter (film)}} *'''Multilingualism''': Kraven is shown to be fluent in Russian and English. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Nikolai Kravinoff]] † - Father, Enemy and Indirect Victim *[[Anna Kravinova]] - Mother † *[[Chameleon|Dmitri Kravinoff/Chameleon]] - Paternal half-brother and Enemy *[[Sonya Smerdyakova]] - Step-mother ===Allies=== *[[Calypso|Calypso Ezili]] - Savior, Close Friend and Love Interest *[[Aliya Kimani]] *[[Ellie]] - Friend *[[Mofo]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Semyon Chorney]] † - Target and Victim *[[Tagland|Mr. Tagland]] † - Target and Victim *[[Andre Lavigne]] † - Target and Victim *[[Rhino's Crew]] **[[Rhino|Aleksei Sytsevich/Rhino]] † - Former Ally, Attempted Killer and Victim **[[Bert]] † - Indirect Victim **[[Ömer Ozdemir]] † - Attempted Victim **[[Foreigner]] † - Attempted Victim and Attempted Killer *[[Spider-Man|Peter Parker/Spider-Man]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Sergei Nikolaevich Kravinoff''' is a big game hunter who sought to defeat [[Spider-Man]] in order to prove he is the greatest hunter in the world, as well as taking on the moniker of Kraven the Hunter. He is also one of the members of the [[Sinister Six]] along with [[Vulture]], and [[Doctor Octopus]]. *[[Kraven Pastries]] is an easter egg to Kraven the Hunter. *The Tarot cards that connected to Kraven in the film were: The High Priestess (Calypso), The Tower (the lion attack that kills him), and Strength (his survival, return to life, and newfound abilities that make him the greatest hunter). ==Behind the Scenes== *Kraven the Hunter in [[Sony's Spider-Man Universe]] is the first film incarnation of the character. **The first attempt to bring Kraven on screen is in 1974 film ''{{WPS|Spider-Man Versus Kraven the Hunter}}'', where he was played by an unknown actor, but the film was never released. **Sam Raimi had jokingly confirmed that a proposed idea for his cancelled {{WPS|Spider-Man 4}} would reveal that Peter Parker's landlord '''Mr. Diktovich''' (played by {{WPS|Elya Baskin}}), would be an elderly retired Kraven the Hunter, who now laid low under a new identity, having had a daughter, Ursula, and being aware of Peter's double life as Spider-Man, but keeping it secret out of admiration. Raimi would later clarify that this was indeed a joke and not considered as a serious idea for long. **{{WPS|Marc Webb}} confirmed that Kraven the Hunter's spear appears in the end credits of the Sony Pictures film ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man 2}}'', with the intention being that Kraven would have appeared in future films ''{{WPS|Sinister_Six#Film|The Sinister Six}}'' and in ''{{WPS|The Amazing Spider-Man 3}}'' before the franchise was cancelled.[https://comicbook.com/movies/news/amazing-spider-man-2-exclusive-marc-webb-interested-in-kraven-the-hunter-as-a-villain/ Amazing Spider-Man 2 Exclusive: Marc Webb Interested In Kraven The Hunter As A Villain] **{{WPS|Ryan Coogler}} originally wanted to include Kraven the Hunter in the {{WPS|Marvel Cinematic Universe}} film ''{{WPS|Black Panther (film)|Black Panther}}'' due to his appearance in {{WPS|Christopher Priest (comics)|Christopher Priest}}'s ''{{WPS|Black Panther (character)|Black Panther}}'' comic book run, but [[Marvel Studios]] told him that he didn't have the permission to use the character due to [[Sony Pictures Entertainment]] having Kraven's rights.[https://uk.movies.yahoo.com/ryan-coogler-wanted-spider-man-villain-black-panther-exclusive-133330486.html Ryan Coogler reveals which Spider-Man villain he wanted for ''Black Panther'' (EXCLUSIVE)] **{{WPS|Jon Watts}} expressed interest back in 2019 to feature Kraven the Hunter as the main villain in the then untitled MCU film ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: No Way Home}}''.[https://me.ign.com/en/movies/162972/news/spider-man-far-from-home-director-wants-kraven-the-hunter-in-sequel ''Spider-Man: Far From Home'' Director Wants Kraven the Hunter for Third Movie Villain] Watts pitched [[Tom Holland]] a potential third ''Spider-Man'' film pitting [[Spider-Man/Marvel Cinematic Universe|Spider-Man]] against Kraven the Hunter in case the story of ''No Way Home'' couldn't be realized.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FTYQE4RhQYI&t=70s ''Spider-Man: No Way Home'' Was Almost a Kraven the Hunter Movie, Says Tom Holland] *[https://marvelcinematicuniverse.fandom.com/wiki/Lewis_Pullman Lewis Pullman], actor of [https://marvelcinematicuniverse.fandom.com/wiki/Sentry Sentry] from ''{{WPS|Thunderbolts*}}'', auditioned the role of Kraven the Hunter before Aaron Taylor-Johnson.[https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=Gju6u40QYHo Thunderbolts* LEWIS PULLMAN on becoming Sentry, filming THAT post-credit scene + Spaceballs 2!] *[[Joe Kennard]], [[Adam Bowman]], [[Luke Scott]], [[JJ Battell]], [[Oliver Parsons]] and [[Thomas Lorber]] were stunt doubles for [[Aaron Taylor-Johnson]] in the role of Kraven the Hunter. *[[Kraven National Ballet]] was an easter egg to Kraven the Hunter; however, it was only seen in behind-the-scenes images from the 2022 film ''[[Morbius (film)|Morbius]]''.[[:File:Daemond.jpg|''Morbius'' behind-the-scenes image]] ==References== {{Gallery|Kraven the Hunter/Gallery}} {{Wq|Kraven the Hunter}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Sergei Kravinoff (Earth-616)|Kraven the Hunter}}
